title: Identify Target Industries
description: List 3-5 industries or specific roles (e.g., Marketing, Software Dev) to tailor the CV content.

title: Gather Education Details
description: Collect GPA, relevant coursework, and expected graduation date.

title: Audit Extracurriculars
description: List clubs, sports, or volunteer work where you held responsibility.

title: List Technical Skills
description: Identify software, languages, or tools relevant to the internship (e.g., Python, Excel, Adobe Suite).

title: Select CV Template
description: Choose a clean, ATS-friendly professional layout.

title: Write Contact Information
description: Ensure email, LinkedIn URL, and phone number are professional and correct.

title: Draft Professional Summary
description: Write a 2-3 sentence hook focusing on your eagerness to learn and your core strengths.

title: Document Academic Projects
description: Detail 2-3 significant projects, focusing on your specific contribution and results.

title: Quantify Achievements
description: Add numbers to your experience (e.g., 'Increased club membership by 20%').

title: Identify Soft Skills
description: Select keywords like 'Leadership', 'Communication', or 'Problem Solving'.

title: Check Verb Tense Consistency
description: Ensure past roles use past tense and current roles use present tense.

title: Keyword Optimization
description: Scan job descriptions for keywords and integrate them naturally into the CV.

title: Format White Space
description: Adjust margins and line spacing to ensure it is easy to read.

title: Review for Typos
description: Perform a manual read-through and use a spellchecker.

title: Peer Review
description: Have a friend or mentor look over the draft for clarity.

title: Hyperlink Portfolio/LinkedIn
description: Ensure all digital links are clickable and lead to the correct pages.

title: Save as PDF
description: Export the document as a PDF titled 'Firstname_Lastname_CV.pdf'.

title: Draft Cover Letter Template
description: Create a base cover letter that can be quickly customized for each application.

title: Create Application Tracker
description: Set up a spreadsheet to track company names, dates applied, and follow-ups.

title: Submit First Application
description: Send off the CV for your top-choice summer internship.

title: gym
description: go to the gym
